api: SmartReach API v3 (https://api.smartreach.io/api_docs, OpenAPI spec embedded at https://help.smartreach.io/reference/getprospects)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: SmartReach's published OpenAPI 3.0 spec (embedded in its ReadMe-hosted reference docs) documents exactly 25 endpoints across prospects/campaigns/email_settings/do_not_contact/teams/users/accounts/tasks. 7 read streams (the 5 legacy-parity streams plus new users and accounts) and 8 new write actions covering the full documented prospect/campaign/DNC/account/task mutation surface. Single-resource detail GETs that duplicate an already-covered list stream's record shape are excluded as duplicate_of; the per-campaign prospects/settings/stats sub-resource GETs are excluded as duplicate_of or out_of_scope (breadth-vs-cost triage: the same prospect data is already reachable via the top-level prospects stream).

excluded.reason: single-campaign detail; identical per-item record shape to the campaigns list stream's own records, already covered by that stream

per-campaign prospect list; the same prospect records are already reachable (unfiltered) via the top-level prospects stream, and this dialect's fan_out mechanism is reserved for cases with no non-fan-out equivalent — breadth-vs-cost triage for this Pass B pass
per-campaign channel/sender configuration detail; an operational settings probe, not tabular sync data covering multiple campaigns
per-campaign engagement-stats aggregate (opens/clicks/replies); an analytics rollup, not a syncable object record, and the OpenAPI spec does not document its response schema
single-email-setting detail; identical per-item record shape to the email_settings list stream's own records, already covered by that stream
single-team detail; identical per-item record shape to the teams list stream's own records, already covered by that stream
single-user detail; identical per-item record shape to the users list stream's own records, already covered by that stream
single-account detail; identical per-item record shape to the accounts list stream's own records, already covered by that stream
